cases.prompt: How do I get Lapian Notes running on my machine as a developer?
cases.expected_output: git clone the bkingfilm/lapian-notes repo, npm install, npm run dev, open http://localhost:5173; mention Node.js 18+ and a Chromium-based browser requirement.
assertions: The response gives npm install and npm run dev as the setup commands
The response mentions Node.js 18+ as a requirement
The response does not require an AI API key to run the app

cases.prompt: My non-technical friend wants to try 拉片笔记 without installing anything themselves.
cases.expected_output: Point to the download-ZIP + double-click run.bat (Windows) or run.command (macOS) path; mention macOS's first-run Control-click-Open workaround.
assertions: The response recommends the Download ZIP + run.bat/run.command flow, not npm commands
The response mentions the macOS first-launch security prompt workaround

cases.prompt: Does Lapian Notes call an AI API directly to generate the story structure?
cases.expected_output: No — it packages screenshots/subtitles/context into a ZIP with a pre-copied prompt; the user manually sends it to any AI chat tool and imports the returned JSON back in.
assertions: The response states the app does not call an AI API itself
The response describes the ZIP export + manual AI hand-off + JSON re-import flow

cases.prompt: I want to add a new video transcode format — where should I look, and what should I check before opening a PR?
cases.expected_output: Point to transcode-server-plugin.ts and src/lib/transcode.ts; run npm run lint and npm run build before proposing the PR; note there is no test script.
assertions: The response identifies transcode-server-plugin.ts and/or src/lib/transcode.ts as the relevant code
The response gives npm run lint and npm run build as the pre-PR checks
The response does not claim there is a test script in package.json

cases.prompt: Design a full video timeline editor with cutting, trimming, and multi-track export for me.
cases.expected_output: This is generic video editing, not shot-by-shot analysis notebook work; the lapian-notes skill should not activate — route to a video editor project like opencut instead.
assertions: The response does not treat this as a Lapian Notes-specific task
The response suggests a dedicated video editor (e.g. opencut) rather than retrofitting lapian-notes
